text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The final race of the Classic Triple Crown—the
Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I didn't think I would get the chance to run in it
when you removed it from my timetable.
choice_data_list: I'm glad our adjustments paid off.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That said, I must focus on working toward my new
goal now.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I won't fixate on the fact that it's a Triple Crown
race nor will I consider it different from any other
race. This time, I only have one goal...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And that is to get good results, as always. That is
all.
